name: Acolyte's Journey
benefit1: You gain proficiency in light armor, shields and a single common group of weapons. This group may include Channeling Weapons, even though they aren't consider common weapons. (But you only get 1 of the possible channeling weapons).
benefit2: You gain +5 skill points in the Religion skill.
benefit3: You are welcome at establishments for your religion and they are obligated to help you with lodging, advice, food and sometimes equipment.

name: Advanced Artificing
benefit1: You gain Artificer Advanced Crafting Abilities
benefit2: You are able to craft artificers that cost 10000 clim or less.
benefit3: You gain +1 Burden that must be spent on an artifice.

name: Adventurer Essentials
benefit1: You gain proficiency in 1 common weapon group. In addition, you gain proficiency in 1 common or specialized weapon groups.
benefit2: You gain proficiency in 1 armor category of your choosing. Alternatively, you may pick the shield or greatshield.
benefit3: You may use Presence Concealment.

name: Aerial Mage
benefit1: You may use Aerial Mode Switch.
benefit2: While grounded and riding an Aerial Stave, you may reload 2 shells instead of 1 when taking the Reload Artifice basic action on your staff. You may do this even if your hands would normally be full and can draw both shells with 1 action.

name: Aftershocks
benefit1: You may use Aftershock.
benefit2: When using a Fighter, Highlander or Reaver ability that compares Power against a Boss type enemy, you may treat your Power as 2 higher for that purpose. (Does not affect the dmg roll etc)

name: Air Stability
benefit1: The cavalier’s Rider & Mount As One ability applies even while flying. Any damage you take while flying on a flying mount will cause you to lose altitude as if your mount took damage.

name: Angelic Presence
benefit1: You gain Angelic Presence, which gives a +1 to Presence.

name: Armorsmith Basics
benefit1: You gain proficiency in light armor, medium armor and shields.
benefit2: You gain proficiency in 1 basic melee weapon and can use a smith's hammer as a bludgeoning weapon in which you are proficient.
benefit3: You can craft armors, shields and cloaks using Iron, Tamahagane, Animal Hide and Direhide, as well as alloys. You may use an IP to perform an EP action tied to this key ability 4 times.
benefit4: You gain Armorsmith Core Crafting abilities.

name: Armorsmithing Expert
benefit1: You gain the Master Armorer's core crafting abilities
benefit2: You may craft using Mithril, Orihalcum, Primehide and Dragonscale materials.

name: Arms Mastery
benefit1: You are considered proficient with every melee weapon you wield (This does not count as being proficient for class requirements).

name: Artificer Basics
benefit1: You gain Artificer Core Crafting Abilities
benefit2: You can craft using non-advanced materials and base materials. You may use an IP to perform an EP action tied to this key ability 4 times.
benefit3: You can now craft Artifices and Firearms. You are able to craft artifices that cost 2500 clim or less.
benefit4: You gain proficiency in the musket and the Artificer's Multitool.

name: Augmented Casting - Increased Reach
benefit1: You may use Increased Reach.

name: Augmented Casting - Persistent Spell
benefit1: You may use Persistent Spell.

name: Authority
benefit1: You may treat any roll on Negotiation and Intimidation checks that are below 10 as being a 10 and may spend 2 mana before rolling to treat the roll as a 20 instead.
benefit2: One of your eyes becomes an Domination Eye. It may be used to make Mystic Eye type abilities of the appropriate type. An eye can only be a single mystic eye type.

name: Benevolence
benefit1: You gain Elemental Mastery: Holy
benefit2: Your attacks do not consume Illumination on miss.
benefit3: You may choose not to use the effect of Illumination on a target.(Must be declared before an attack is made).

name: Bone Armor
benefit1: You may use Bone Armor.

name: Botany Study
benefit1: You gain the ability to detect if foraged food is poisonous or unsafe to eat, nearly guaranteeing its safety.  If it is a common poison, you can also identify its effect.
benefit2: You gain the ability to properly process some poisonous mushrooms, fruits and herbs, making them edible as a Camp Action.  You can process up to 100u at a time.
benefit3: You gain the ability to harvest Tier 2 Foraging Outcrops.
benefit4: You gain proficiency in Artifice Chainsaws and may use it as a gathering tool.

name: Boundless Wind
benefit1: You may use Boundless Wind Stance.

name: Brace
benefit1: When using the Prepare action to prepare a melee attack with a polearm, if your target of that prepared attack moved more than 20ft that turn (excluding teleports), your attack gains Full Pierce and does maximum damage. Against a mounted enemy this also gains Sure Hit and on damage, their movement becomes 0 until the start of your turn.
benefit2: On mastering this class, the Sure Hit property (but not the movement nullification) of your prepared attack against mounted enemies now also applies against Beast type enemies that are large size or bigger.

name: Cannon Expert
benefit1: You gain proficiency in Cannons.
benefit2: Your attacks with the Cannon keyword ignore the 1 attack limitation of cannons.
benefit3: You may use Rocket Jump.

name: Carpenter Basics
benefit1: You can use a carpenters chisel as a crafting tool for carpenters crafts and buildings.
benefit2: You can craft using Pine and Maple, as well as alloys. You may use an IP to perform an EP action tied to this key ability 4 times.
benefit3: You gain proficiency in axes. You also gain proficiency in either bows or crossbows.
benefit4: You can use the Carpenter's core crafting abilities.

name: Celestial Artillery
benefit1: When attacking an enemy that’s further than 80ft away, your spells with the Celestial keyword gain the Artillery keyword.
benefit2: You may use Comet.

name: Cloudstep
benefit1: You may use Cloudstep.

name: Controlled Blaze
benefit1: When you deal Fire Damage, you may choose not to ignite flammable objects.
benefit2: You gain Fire Mastery.

name: Controlled Opportunities
benefit1: You gain Heavy Armor proficiency.
benefit2: When making an attack of opportunity, you gain a +2 bonus to the accuracy and damage roll.

name: Controlled Wind
benefit1: When pushing a target back or up with a Wind Spell, you may choose to push up to the maximum distance instead of always pushing the maximum distance.

name: Cool Spotlight
benefit1: Your Idol songs gain +15ft range.  This stacks with other key abilities that increase their range.
benefit2: Your One Beat, One Heart song does not count towards your song limit.
benefit3: When paying upkeep for One Beat, One Heart, you may spend 1 mana to double its effect.

name: Craft Weapons
benefit1: You gain Blacksmith Core Crafting Abilities.
benefit2: You can craft using the Iron and Tamahagane base materials, as well as any alloys. You may use an IP to perform an EP action tied to this key ability 4 times.
benefit3: You can use a Smith’s Hammer as a crafting tool for blacksmithing crafts. You may also use it as a Bludgeoning weapon in which you are proficient.
benefit4: You gain proficiency in 1 smithing weapon.

name: Culinary Basics
benefit1: You gain Culinarian Core Crafting Abilities
benefit2: You can craft stocks using advanced and base materials. You may use an IP to perform an EP action tied to this key ability 4 times.
benefit3: You can use a Frying Pan as a crafting tool for culinarian crafts. You may also use it as a Light Bludgeoning weapon in which you are proficient.
benefit4: You gain proficiency in small weapons.

name: Cultivator's Journey
benefit1: Your unarmed attack damage is treated as a One-Handed Weapon in which you are proficient.
benefit2: You gain proficiency in light armor, light swords and another weapon of your choice.
benefit3: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Appraise, Athletics, Deception, Perception, Insight, Medicine, Intimidation, Stealth or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

name: Dark Surge
benefit1: After you deal damage to yourself, you gain Dark Surge for your next unarmed attack that turn. Dark Surge gives you +1 Accuracy.

name: Death Perception
benefit1: You may use Death Perception.
benefit2: One of your eyes becomes a Shinigami Eye. It may be used to make Mystic Eye type abilities of the appropriate type. An eye can only be a single mystic eye type.

name: Deflect Everything
benefit1: You may use your Parry ability against every kind of attack, as well as against Save effects that you could Block.

name: Dimensional Armory
benefit1: You can create a pocket dimension with Dimensional Armory.  Creating the pocket dimension and establishing its door takes 1 week and costs 1 errand point.  The entry point can be any regular door that you fit through.  When the creator opens this door, they can decide instead to access the Dimensional Armory, which is a 15ft x 15ft closet.  This closet can hold up to 6 Burden worth of items.  Some magic items can be rejected by the dimensional armory (GM’s discretion), such as Divine Arms not bonded to you.  If the owner of a Dimensional Armory dies, everything inside of it appears in the next unoccupied space possible next to the owner.
benefit2: Any burden reducing items (such as an alchemy rig) in the armory have no effect.

name: Disable Magic
benefit1: When using Decipher Magic, you are able to disable both tier 1 and tier 2 level bounded fields.
benefit2: You are able to disable or change who is excluded from your own Bounded Fields for 0 RP.

name: Discern Immunities
benefit1: You may use Discern Immunities.

name: Draw Elements
benefit1: You may use Draw Elements.

name: Draw Elements II
benefit1: You may use Draw Elements II.

name: Earth Weapon
benefit1: When attacking with a weapon, you may choose to have the weapon deal Earth Damage instead of its normal damage type. You must declare you chosen damage type before making the accuracy roll.

name: Elemental Convergence
benefit1: You may use Elemental Convergence.

name: Emergency Shields
benefit1: You may cast Power Word: Shield and Power Word: Guardian Shield (when obtained) by spending 1 RP instead of 2 AP.

name: Empty Body
benefit1: You may use Empty Body.

name: Envenom Weapon
benefit1: You may use Envenom Weapon.

name: Eternal Flames
benefit1: When you would apply Burning on your turn, you instead apply Hellfire. Hellfire functions like Burning, but it can no longer be removed the normal way if not removed before the end of the target’s next turn. Hellfire can be applied to enemies immune to Burning, but it can still be removed like normal even after a turn has passed. Hellfire is automatically removed at the end of the encounter.
benefit2: If you apply Hellfire to a target that is already burning, you deal extra fire damage equal to your Power.

name: Eternal Mirane Cage
benefit1: You may use Eternal Mirane Cage.

name: Evil Eye
benefit1: While you have a Mystic Eye active, you gain a +10 Mystic Eye bonus to perception checks relying on sight.
benefit2: One of your eyes becomes an Evil Eye. It may be used to make Mystic Eye type abilities of the appropriate type. An eye can only be a single mystic eye type.

name: Execute the Heretic
benefit1: You may use Execute Heretic

name: Expanded Circuits
benefit1: You gain Expanded Circuits, which gives +2 maximum mana.

name: Expanded Menagerie
benefit1: You may spend 1 mana with using Summon Animal to choose which animal you summon.
benefit2: You add the Cheetah and Landshark to the pool of animals you can summon.

name: Expert Alchemist
benefit1: You gain Alchemeister Core Crafting Abilities.
benefit2: When using Throw Potion, you may infuse it using your own mana. You spend X mana and the mana cost the target needs to pay to benefit from the potion is reduced by X (the mana cost cannot go below 0).

name: Expert Farmer
benefit1: You may use the Agrarian's core crafting abilities.

name: Expert Scribe
benefit1: You gain +5 points in Art: Calligraphy expertise skill. This is not doubled for expertise bonus.
benefit2: You may draw scrolls, talismans or similar objects for 0 AP once per turn. When you do, reduce the AP cost of that talisman by 1. Even if you do not consume the talisman, it only benefits from the AP reduction once per turn.

name: Faerie Light Eyes
benefit1: Faerie Light Eyes provide protection against Illusions, giving you the ability to immediately see the reality warping distortions that illusions cause.  The user is not only notified of illusions, but immune to all but your own.
benefit2: One of your eyes becomes a Faerie Light Eye. It may be used to make Mystic Eye type abilities of the appropriate type. An eye can only be a single mystic eye type.

name: Fallen Friend
benefit1: When an Heroic tier ally reaches 0 HP, you may immediately enter Rage Stance for 0 AP and RP as well as 0 mana. You can use this even if you don’t have the Rage ability yet.

name: Fancy Footwork
benefit1: You gain proficiency with Dueling Weapons. While wielding a dueling weapon, you also gain the light blades' Nimble ability, even if not wielding or proficient with light blades.

name: Farming Basics
benefit1: You gain proficiency in the scythe specialized weapon and can use it as farming tool. You also gain proficiency in the Sickle and can use it as a farming tool and One-Handed axe.
benefit2: You can plant seeds in plots of land that sprout into harvestable Food and Alchemy materials. You can work 10 plots of land.
benefit3: You gain Farmer core abilities.

name: Fighter's Journey
benefit1: You gain proficiency in 5 common weapons groups.
benefit2: You gain proficiency in all light armor, medium armor and normal shields.
benefit3: You gain +5 HP.

name: Fire Stance
benefit1: You may use Tempestuous Fire Stance

name: Fire Weapon
benefit1: When attacking with a weapon, you may choose to have the weapon deal Fire Damage instead of its normal damage type. You must declare your chosen damage type before making the accuracy roll.

name: Five Harmonies
benefit1: You may use Luminous Form Stance.

name: Focused Weapons
benefit1: You gain Forgemaster Core Crafting Abilities.
benefit2: You can craft using Mithril and Orihalcum.

name: Forager's Path
benefit1: You gain proficiency in Giant Scissors and proficiency in your choice between Axes or Hori. You may use axes for harvesting foraging outcrops.
benefit2: You gain the ability to harvest Tier 1 Foraging Outcrops.
benefit3: You gain the ability to use natural item as replacements for an Adventurers Kit and Torches such as:  using the sun/moss as a compass, using vines as rope etc.  The material must be available (GM’s discretion)
benefit4: You gain the ability to create Wood Blocks as an Errand.  See item: Carpenter Materials. You may use an IP to do this 4 times instead.

name: Frost Weapon
benefit1: When attacking with a weapon, you may choose to have the weapon deal Frost Damage instead of its normal damage type. You must declare you chosen damage type before making the accuracy roll.

name: Fungal Metabolite
benefit1: Due to symbiotic fungi within your body, you become resistant to all commonly known (book) poisons and may use Resist Poison.
benefit2: After being infected by an exotic poison or disease and surviving, that poison/disease is added to your list of resistances. Any disease or poison that you are resistant to can be used with Amoxicillin.
benefit3: Against a poison you are resistant to, you may use Resist Poison for 0 RP, 1 Mana instead of 1 RP.

name: Giant Strength
benefit1: While in Rage Stance, you may choose to have your size be treated as one size bigger than it actually is. You get an additional +5 bonus to Fitness checks during Rage stance regardless.

name: Gravity Master
benefit1: When you push or pull an enemy on your turn, you may spend 1 mana to increase this distance by 10ft. You may also spend 1 mana to instead ignore the effects of 1 source of Immovable on a target you’re attempting to push, unless that target is permanently Immovable.

name: Greatshield Master
benefit1: You gain proficiency in Greatshields. While wearing a Greatshield, any ally standing behind you that is the target of a ranged attack may treat you as high cover.

name: Gun Martial Arts
benefit1: You can fire your pistols while in melee range of an enemy without provoking attacks of opportunity.
benefit2: You can make unarmed attacks even if carrying a pistol in both hands. If wielding a weapon other than a pistol, this no longer applies. When wielding only pistols and no other weapons, your unarmed attacks benefit from your pistol material bonuses.

name: Gunslinger's Agility
benefit1: You gain proficiency in pistols.
benefit2: You gain +1 Gunslinger bonus to Initiative.

name: Heavy Cavalry
benefit1: You gain Medium Armor and Heavy Armor proficiency.
benefit2: Every enemy damaged by your Trample effects become Challenged by you until the start of your next turn.

name: Holy Orders
benefit1: You may use Holy Orders.

name: Holy Weapon
benefit1: When attacking with a weapon, you may choose to have the weapon deal Holy Damage instead of its normal damage type.
benefit2: You may choose to have your weapon emit light as if it was a lantern. You can enable or disable this effect for 1 AP.

name: Iaijutsu
benefit1: If you become the target of an attack while you're surprised, you may still react to it and any special properties of an attack that require you to be unaware of the attack (such as Killshot) do not apply to it.
benefit2: You may sheathe and draw katanas for 0 AP once per turn per katana.
benefit3: You start each battle in the 'Iai' state, which is used for Iai abilities. Making an attack with a katana removes the Iai state for that weapon. Using a skill that requires the Iai state requires the weapon to be sheathed and will remove the Iai state for ALL your weapons, unless specified otherwise.

name: Ice Cold
benefit1: You are immune to Slows and difficult terrain effects with the Frost keyword.
benefit2: You are immune to regular weather effects involving cold.
benefit3: You gain Frost Mastery.  Mastery of an element allows you to use it in Channeling weapon attacks and use it to perform minor tricks relating to it.

name: Idol's Journey
benefit1: You gain proficiency in wands, small weapons and light armor.
benefit2: You gain +5 skill points in Art.
benefit3: You may use One Beat, One Heart

name: Improved Death Perception
benefit1: You can see the death of non-living things allowing you to automatically do maximum, full pierce damage against objects.
benefit2: You apply 1 Mark of Death every time you hit an enemy with ‘Lines of Death’ or ‘Point of Death’ up to a maximum of 7 marks.

name: Improvised Weaponry
benefit1: When using improvised weapons, they deal the same damage as normal weapons would.
benefit2: You may use Chair Grab.
benefit3: Upon mastering this class, your improvised weapon attacks all gain the Prone keyword.

name: Inconspicuous
benefit1: If you're traveling stealthily, you may roll separate stealth checks even if traveling with the party. When doing this, any surprise rounds for you are determined purely off your own rolls and not your parties.
benefit2: During a surprise round, enemies you attack are still treated as having 0 RP for the purposes of ability requirements even after you attack them until they start their turn. You still gain this benefit, even if your allies attacked them already.

name: Independent Actor
benefit1: When working alone (No known allies within 300ft of you) you gain a +10 bonus to Perception, Insight, Survival and Stealth checks. Must be alone for at least 15 minutes to gain this benefit.
benefit2: You gain a +5 bonus in Art (Cartography) expertise. This is not doubled for expertise bonus.
benefit3: You may use Scout’s Retreat.
benefit4: Having an Aetherie or similar connection active automatically fails the ‘No known allies’ requirements.

name: Infiltrate
benefit1: When you use Decipher Magic, you may use Roguecraft instead of Magic as the skill for it. In addition, you can modify the effect in such a way that it no longer affects you and your allies rather than completely disabling it.

name: Jump
benefit1: When using an ability with the Jump keyword, you do not take fall damage.
benefit2: You may use Jump.

name: Knight of Yddrasil
benefit1: You may use Fluttering Blade.
benefit2: If an enemy is holding a weapon affected by your Fluttering Blade, you may spend 1 RP to deal Heavy Full Pierce damage to it.

name: Knight of Yddrasil II
benefit1: You may use Fae Knight Style: Willow Stance

name: Light Cavalry
benefit1: While mounted and while you and your mount both wear light armor or no armor, you ignore natural difficult terrain.

name: Lightning Strikes Twice
benefit1: When the Static you apply deals damage to an enemy, that enemy becomes afflicted with Static X, where X is the value of the Static that damaged it.

name: Lightning Weapon
benefit1: When attacking with a weapon, you may choose to have the weapon deal Lightning Damage instead of its normal damage type. You must declare your chosen damage type before making the accuracy roll.

name: Living Cover
benefit1: While mounted, any ally within 5ft of you may use you as Low Cover. If an attack would miss them because of your cover benefit, the attack instead hits you.

name: Look of Death
benefit1: You may use Perish.
benefit2: One of your eyes becomes an Destruction Eye. It may be used to make Mystic Eye type abilities of the appropriate type. An eye can only be a single mystic eye type.

name: Lord's Dominion
benefit1: You can partially resist the effect of the sun. You may now spend 1 round in the sun before you start taking damage. Spending a turn outside of the sun resets this effect, giving you another round where you do not suffer the negative effects.
benefit2: You gain +1 Vampire Lord bonus to Presence.

name: Mage Armor
benefit1: You may use Mage Armor

name: Mage Knight
benefit1: You may also use Canter after casting a spell.

name: Mage of the Tides
benefit1: You can use Blue Tide.
benefit2: You gain Elemental Mastery: Water
benefit3: You gain the ability to walk on water and skate across its surface—every 10ft of water surface movement only costs 5ft of movement.

name: Mage's Journey
benefit1: You gain proficiency in the Channeling weapon group's weapons and gain Arcane Mastery. Mastery of an element allows you to use it in Channeling weapon attacks and use it to perform minor tricks relating to it.
benefit2: You gain +5 skill points in the Magic skill.
benefit3: You can use Sense Magic.

name: Magic Resistance
benefit1: You gain a +2 Anti-Mage bonus to your saves against Spells.

name: Maid Training
benefit1: You gain proficiency in staves (broom), small weapons, sets of missiles and light armor.
benefit2: You gain 5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Stealth, Roguecraft, Medicine, Common Knowledge, Linguistics, Appraise, History, Perception, Insight, Survival or Intimidation. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.
benefit3: You may use Graceful Service.

name: Mana Sight
benefit1: You may use Mana Sight.
benefit2: One of your eyes becomes an Life Perception Eye. It may be used to make Mystic Eye type abilities of the appropriate type. An eye can only be a single mystic eye type.
benefit3: When making an attack with the Mystic Eye keyword that use the Life Perception eye, you ignore 1 point of guard.

name: Martial Artist's Journey
benefit1: Your unarmed attack damage is treated as a One-Handed Weapon in which you are proficient.
benefit2: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Perception, Insight, Medicine, Intimidation or a relevant Expert Knowledge skill (By DM approval). You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.
benefit3: You can use Discipline.

name: Mass Index
benefit1: Your spells with the Gravity keyword deal extra damage to the target based on its size. They deal an additional 1 damage to large creatures and an additional 3 to Huge creatures.
benefit2: You may use Gravity Crush.

name: Medic's Journey
benefit1: You gain proficiency in small weapons, set of missiles and light armor.
benefit2: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Medicine. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in this skill.
benefit3: You gain the benefits of First Response.

name: Mending
benefit1: You may spend an EP to restore a Broken item. Some items (such as consumables) cannot be repaired (GM’s discretion).

name: Merchant Lord
benefit1: Procurement Limit increases to 3000 and you can procure materials that cost <= 3000 clim per ingot/block.
benefit2: You gain proficiency in Pistols.
benefit3: Upon mastering this class, the Procurement Limit increases to 4000 and you can procure materials that cost <= 4000 clim per ingot/block.

name: Mime's Journey
benefit1: You gain proficiency in 1 common and 1 specialized weapon
benefit2: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Art. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in this skill.
benefit3: As a mime, you’re not allowed to speak. If you speak during an encounter, you cannot use any Mime abilities until the end of the encounter.

name: Mission Control
benefit1: You gain proficiency in the Aetherie Sensory Station.
benefit2: You may use Mind Connection.

name: Mounted Basics
benefit1: You gain proficiency in Polearms, Lances, Light armor, Shields and one other common weapon group of your choice.
benefit2: You gain 5 skill points in Riding. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.
benefit3: You may use Spirit Jump.
benefit4: If you have mastered cavalier, your mount can withstand one lethal blow. If your mount would be reduced to 0 HP or below by an attack, it instead is reduced to 1 HP. Only works once per encounter.

name: Natural Cycle
benefit1: At the start of your turn you may pay upkeep 1 mana for each Regrowth you have on an ally. If you do, you may extend its duration by 1 turn. You can choose this upkeep separately for each Regrowth.
benefit2: You may use Regrowth.

name: Nightstalker
benefit1: You gain 60ft darkvision, allowing you to see perfectly in the dark even without a source of light. If you already have darkvision, the range of it improves by 60ft.

name: Ninja Style
benefit1: You gain proficiency in both Small Weapons and Sets of Missiles.
benefit2: You may use Ninja Run.

name: Ninja Techniques
benefit1: Your Ninja Run now lasts for the entire turn.
benefit2: You may use Genjutsu Kai

name: On my terms
benefit1: While you are at 1 HP or higher, damage (including true damage) you take during your own turn cannot reduce you below 1 HP.
benefit2: When you roll a 1 on a skill check, something unexpected may happen (GM's discretion). This is usually bad, but it could also turn out to be a blessing in disguise.

name: Ore Hunter
benefit1: You can gather Tier 2 mining outcrops.
benefit2: You are an expert and tying knots. Using rope, you can secure yourself to objects and safely rappel down to investigate down cliffsides.

name: Overwhelming Critical
benefit1: When you roll a critical hit while making a Heavy attack with a Two-Handed weapon you may use Aftershock even if the attack didn’t miss. This use doesn’t count against the normal use limit of it and this effect still applies even if the critical hit was blocked or otherwise defended against.

name: Past Self
benefit1: You may use Past Self.
benefit2: Using the Delay encounter start action does not consume your encounter start action use and may use it multiple times.

name: Peddler of Wares
benefit1: Your in-combat burden capacity increases by 1.
benefit2: You gain proficiency in 1 common weapon group.
benefit3: You gain +5 skill points in Riding.
benefit4: Upon mastering this class, the Procurement Limit increases to 2000 and you can procure materials that cost <= 2000 clim per ingot/block.

name: Perfect Mimicry
benefit1: When given enough preparation time and enough knowledge about the subject, you are able to perfectly impersonate another person (GM’s discretion on what is ‘enough’). When disguised in this way, other people are unable to see through your disguise through normal means unless you act or say things that are strange enough to draw suspicions. This disguise is partially magical in nature, but cannot make up for obvious size or shape differences.

name: Phantom Thief
benefit1: You are able to disable and modify t2 and t3 bounded fields.
benefit2: You may use Stolen Skill.

name: Pierrot's Journey
benefit1: You gain proficiency in small weapons, bludgeoning weapons and light armor.
benefit2: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Art. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in this skill.
benefit3: You gain 2 Damage Reduction against pies.

name: Puppet Grandmaster
benefit1: You can summon puppets under your control using Summon Piece. While these puppets follow movement rules as described in the abilities and are always Medium size, they can appear as whatever you wish, decided when you take this class.
benefit2: As an EP action, you may change the appearance of your pieces.

name: Raise Undead
benefit1: You may use Raise Undead.

name: Ranger's Journey
benefit1: You gain proficiency in light and medium armor, a common ranged weapon group and a common melee weapon group.
benefit2: You gain 5 points in one of the following: Appraise, Athletics, Stealth, Medicine, Perception, Survival, Animal Husbandry or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.
benefit3: You can use Status Assessment.

name: Rapid Blasts
benefit1: You may use Ki Blast II.

name: Receive Oracle
benefit1: You may use Receive Oracle.

name: Recover Power
benefit1: Any temporary HP on you at the end of an encounter is converted into healing. You regain HP equal to half the value of temporary HP you have remaining.

name: Resheathe
benefit1: You may use Resheathe.

name: Rock and Stone
benefit1: You gain proficiency in 1 armor or in the shield. You also gain proficiency in the Pickaxe specialty weapon.
benefit2: You gain the ability to gather mining outcrops.
benefit3: You gain the ability to create Ingots as an Errand.  See item: Blacksmithing Materials. You may use an IP to do this 4 times instead.

name: Rogue's Journey
benefit1: You gain proficiency with light armor and with one of the following weapon groups: Small weapons, Light swords, Dueling weapons and Set of missiles.
benefit2: You gain +5 skill points in Roguecraft and +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Stealth, Deception, Perception, Insight, Negotiation, Intimidation or a relevant Expert Knowledge skill (By DM Approval).  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.
benefit3: You can use Feint.

name: Rolling Thunder
benefit1: After moving at least 40ft in a turn, your next unarmed strike that turn gains a +2 Transcendent Lightning bonus to accuracy and damage.

name: Saboteur
benefit1: You gain proficiency in Saboteur Thread Daggers.
benefit2: You may use Presence Concealment.

name: Sanctioned Healer
benefit1: When you attack an enemy with Sanctify, you may choose not to trigger the effect of it.
benefit2: You gain Elemental Mastery: Holy

name: Scholar of Tactics
benefit1: You gain proficiency in Pistols.
benefit2: You may use Take Cover!.

name: Shared Darkness
benefit1: The range of your darkvision increases by 60ft.
benefit2: You may use Darkvision.

name: Shield the Fallen
benefit1: You may use Shield the Fallen.

name: Shielding Fist
benefit1: While you have at least 1 hand empty and aren't wielding a shield, you gain a +4 Shield bonus to your block.

name: Shrug it off
benefit1: You may use Vital Drive II.

name: Snipe
benefit1: You gain proficiency in Sniper Rifles.
benefit2: If you did not move this turn or the previous turn you gain a +1d4 Snipe bonus to your accuracy roll on attacks made with a Sniper Rifle.

name: Song without Song
benefit1: You may have 1 additional song active at the same time.
benefit2: You learn the language 'Music'.

name: Sorcerer's Journey
benefit1: You gain proficiency in Channeling Weapons and Light Armor.
benefit2: You gain +5 skill points in Magic.
benefit3: You gain Arcane Mastery. Upon mastering this class, you may master an additional element of your choice.

name: Soul Absorption
benefit1: You gain Elemental Mastery: Dark
benefit2: You may use Soul Absorption.

name: Soul Bond
benefit1: When you acquire this ability, choose 1 willing person. That person is treated as your Soulmate and several of the class abilities only work on your Soulmate. This cannot be changed unless your Soulmate dies.
benefit2: Your Soulmate is always treated as your VIP for any bodyguard abilities. You may still designate another VIP as normal.

name: Sound the retreat
benefit1: You may use Sound the retreat

name: Spell Challenge
benefit1: When targeting or damaging an enemy with a spell, you may choose to inflict Challenge on them until the end of your next turn.
benefit2: When an enemy that is Challenged by you provokes an attack of opportunity from you, you may instead use Abjurer's Blast against them. The heavy and precise version of this cost 1 RP, while the light version costs 0 RP.

name: Spell Transfer
benefit1: When you use the Create Talisman ability, an ally may spend their Errand action to use one of their spells to put on the talisman instead of your own. You only create 1 copy of this talisman per Errand action and cannot use Secret Art spells with it.

name: Spore Symbiote
benefit1: You can use Spore Symbiote.
benefit2: You gain Earth Elemental Mastery.
benefit3: You can create a cute mushroom cap hat to wear.

name: Status Assessment II
benefit1: You may use Status Assessment II.

name: Store Time
benefit1: You can use Store Time.

name: Studied Healer
benefit1: You gain +5 skill points in the Religion skill.
benefit2: Followers of your Religion are more obligated to listen to you, granting you a +5 Negotiation Bonus when dealing with them.

name: Stygian Comprehension
benefit1: You gain Elemental Mastery: Dark
benefit2: You may use Dark Bolt.

name: Summon Animal
benefit1: You may use Summon Animal.

name: Summoning Basics
benefit1: You may channel for 10 minutes after which you arrive at the space between worlds, allowing you to interact with Eidolons that wish to meet with you.
benefit2: You may use Attune Eidolon.

name: Superconductor
benefit1: When you make an attack that deals Lightning damage to a target afflicted with Static, you gain a +1 accuracy bonus.
benefit2: You gain Elemental Mastery: Lightning.

name: Superior Assessment
benefit1: You may use Status Assessment III.

name: Surgical Precision
benefit1: When you deal damage with a one-handed melee weapon that is both Sure Hit and Full Pierce or a critical hit, you inflict Bleeding on the target for 1 turn. This effect stacks with other Bleeds effects and itself up to 3 times.

name: Take the advantage
benefit1: When attacking a target inflicted with Offstep, Stagger or Blinded, you gain a +1 accuracy bonus against them.

name: Terrifying Charge
benefit1: When dealing damage with the trample effect or with your Secret Art: Override, any non-heroic target you damage becomes Shaken until the end of their next turn.

name: The Alchemist
benefit1: You gain Alchemist Core Crafting Abilities, and proficiency in 1 basic weapon.
benefit2: You can craft using non-advanced materials and base materials. You may use an IP to perform an EP action tied to this key ability 4 times.
benefit3: You can use an Alchemist's Alembic as crafting tool for alchemy crafts.
benefit4: You craft 3 of the same Elixir, Potion, Flask, Poison or Salve when using an interlude point instead of 1. You only need to pay the listed cost once.

name: Thefts of the past
benefit1: When making a check with the Roguecraft skill, you may treat the object or person you’re interacting with as being up to an hour in the past. This may allow you to steal things not currently carried, open doors before they were locked and more. Does not work in combat and an item that is consumed cannot be stolen.
benefit2: Using the Delay encounter start action does not consume your encounter start action use and you may use it multiple times.

name: Throwing Rhythm
benefit1: When you make an attack with a throwing weapon, or take the thrown attack basic action, you may move 5ft as if you had the light sword passive (Nimble).

name: Timberwright's Core Crafting
benefit1: You may use the Timberwright's Core Crafting abilities
benefit2: You may craft using Ash and Yew materials.

name: Titan's Grip
benefit1: You may wield a Two-Handed weapon in 1 hand allowing you to use a second (Two-Handed) weapon or shield in your offhand.
benefit2: While dual wielding Two-Handed weapons, you may make dual wield attacks as if they were One-Handed weapons.

name: Toss a coin
benefit1: As an Errand action, you may perform in a city or town and earn Clim equal to your relevant Art roll x 10 up to a maximum of 300 clim.

name: Toxic Blast
benefit1: You may use Toxic Blast.

name: Tranquil Prayers
benefit1: Your Acolyte, Priest and High Priest Healing abilities heal for 2x value when used out of combat.

name: Transfusion
benefit1: You may use Transfusion.

name: Transmutation Basics
benefit1: You gain Transmuter Core Crafting Abilities. You may use one of these abilities in a crafting session. If you use one of these abilities, other transmuters can no longer use their co craft abilities with you. Similarly, if a co crafter uses one of these abilities for you, you can no longer use any of these abilities.
benefit2: You can craft using non-advanced materials and base materials. You may use an IP to perform an EP action tied to this key ability 4 times.
benefit3: You can now craft Elixirs, Potions, Flasks and Salves. You craft 3 of the same Elixir, Potion, Flask or Salve when using an interlude point instead of 1. You only need to pay the listed cost once.
benefit4: You gain proficiency in alchemist’s tools and 1 basic weapon type.

name: Transmutation Tricks
benefit1: For 1 AP, You can create small items using transmuting to provide temporary comforts and curiosities— a cup to drink out of, a chair to sit down on, a figurine etc.  These items cannot have significant gameplay factors (such as a key or a tool).  If you’d like to create something small to give away or sell, you must utilize x amount of commodities of whatever quantity and type the GM decides.
benefit2: You may use your transmuter abilities a second time during a craft or co craft.
benefit3: You may use the following abilities:

name: Transmuter of Life
benefit1: You may use Biohacking.
benefit2: You can store up to one gene in your gene inventory.

name: Trap Basics
benefit1: You may convert 100u of junk into a Trapper's Trap you can use for your abilities. You may do so as a Rest action or as an Errand action. Trapper's Traps are a special item that cost 1 burden.
benefit2: You may carry up to 3 Trapper's Traps without them costing Burden.
benefit3: When resting at your camp outdoors, you may set traps that will alert you to enemies approaching by using a rest action. These do not consume a Trapper's Trap,  but allow you to use Survival to detect enemies instead of Perception. After each of such rests, you obtain 1d10 x 5 food units.

name: Tremorsense
benefit1: You gain Earth Mastery.
benefit2: You may use Tremorsense

name: Undead Mastery
benefit1: For every 300 spirit core you possess above 2000, you can control 1 extra zombie with your Create Undead.

name: Vampiric Strength
benefit1: Your unarmed attack damage is treated as a One-Handed Weapon in which you are proficient. Your unarmed attacks cannot deal non-lethal damage.
benefit2: You may use the Vampire Bite ability.

name: Versatile Range
benefit1: You may treat your polearm’s threatened range as 5ft instead of 5-10ft. You must declare this during your turn and it lasts until the start of your next turn.

name: VIP Protection
benefit1: At the start of each arc, choose one person other than yourself as your VIP for that arc. Your VIP is the target for several of your abilities.
benefit2: You may use VIP Protection.
benefit3: If you choose a VIP, you cannot become the target of a VIP protection yourself.

name: Wall Ride
benefit1: When you create a wall on your turn using your Geomancer or Geomaster abilities, you may move along the wall as it is created. You can jump off at any point of the wall creation, ending in an empty square next to the wall.

name: Wind Master
benefit1: You gain Wind Mastery.
benefit2: You can use Glide.

name: Zhen Jiao
benefit1: When you move toward an enemy as part of a Bajiquan ability, your attack deals two  extra points of damage for every 5ft moved.
